repeat.confirm: Push the job to the queue
repeat.confirmed: Job has been pushed to the queue

warning.title: Warning: risk of data modification - Proceed with caution
warning.subtitle: This action may modify existing data.

error.title: Danger: risk of data loss - Proceed with extreme caution
error.subtitle: This action overwrites existing data. Ensure you have a backup before proceeding.

LocaleDeduplicateFoods.uploadHint: Plain text file, one food code per line.
LocaleDeduplicateFoods.dryRun: Dry run (check for errors, but do not modify data)
LocaleDeduplicateFoods.uploadReadError: The uploaded file could not be read.

errors.noPrimaryCode: No primary code was found for "{name}". Codes used for this food: {codes}.
errors.multiplePrimaryCodes: Multiple primary codes were provided for "{name}". Codes used for this food: {codes}.

alert.1: This action will remove duplicate foods (based on their local names) and only keep foods whose codes are in the primary codes list.
alert.2: The change is destructive and cannot be undone. Review the primary codes carefully and make sure you have a backup of the locale food database before proceeding.

alert.1: The copy operation will delete all existing data in the target locale and replace it with data from the source locale.
The food frequency data is automatically updated by the system as new recalls are received.
alert.2: Uploading frequency data from a CSV file will override existing records in the database, potentially leading to data loss.
alert.3: This feature is intended only for initialising new locales or fixing issues with existing frequency data.

LocaleIndexBuild._: Locale - Rebuild Food Indexes for modified locales

alert.1: The import process will update mapping for all nutrients and fields.
The import process will update nutrient values for all foods in the nutrient table based on the provided mapping.
This job will recalculate nutrient values for all survey submissions.
alert.2: Depending on the number of submissions, this process may take a significant amount of time to complete.

valuesOnly.label: Values only (Default)
valuesOnly.description: Recalculate existing nutrient values using stored nutrient table codes

valuesAndCodes.label: Values and nutrient codes
valuesAndCodes.description: Update nutrient codes to current food mappings and recalculate values

syncFields.label: Sync nutrient variables and fields
syncFields.description: Add new nutrients/fields, remove dropped ones, and update all values. Without this, only existing values are updated.

mappingChanges.title: Important: Mapping Changes
mappingChanges.description: This will update submitted data using new nutrient codes in the NDB. This may affect:
mappingChanges.warning: Consider backing up data before proceeding.
